changes: Updated LAST_UPDATED to Mar 28. Added 7 new events total: Iran — Houthis joined war with missile attack on Israel (Mar 28), IRGC formally closed Hormuz to US/allied vessels (Mar 27), Israeli airstrike killed IRGC Navy commander Tangsiri (Mar 26). Saudi Arabia — East-West Pipeline flow tripled to 2.9M bpd (Mar 27). UAE — ADCOP pipeline exports rise to 1.62M bpd (Mar 27), ADNOC Safeen ship hit by projectile in Hormuz (Mar 29, from Kpler/The Loadstar). Oman — Salalah Port struck again by 2 Iranian drones, operations suspended (Mar 29, from Kpler/Maritime Executive). Gas production notes made commodity-specific for all 9 countries. All isNew flags recalculated. Rystad confirms Tropical Cyclone Narelle hit Australian LNG (~29 Mtpa offline) compounding Qatar shutdown. No new FM declarations found since Mar 20.

premiumBrowserSync.kpler: Authenticated (rkanodia@adnoc.ae). Accessed Insight > US & Israel - Iran War signal. Found 6 CRITICAL alerts: Oman Salalah Port drone strike (Mar 29), Safeen ship hit by projectile in Hormuz, Houthis threaten Red Sea escalation, $200 oil forecast. Cumulative oil losses reach 213+ million barrels.
premiumBrowserSync.rystad: Authenticated. Read Alert: Tropical Cyclone Narelle (Mar 28) — ~29 Mtpa Australian LNG capacity affected (Gorgon, Wheatstone, NWS). Edition 22 Iran conflict alert previously captured. Crude Flow Signals Report Mar 2026 available.
premiumBrowserSync.spglobal: Authenticated (after MFA). Read CERA Upstream Intelligence Week of Mar 23-27: Brent ~$105, WTI ~$95, OPEC basket ~$120. SAMREF Yanbu refinery hit by drone (damage unclear, status updated to partial). ADNOC Das Island LNG adjusting production. Haifa refinery back online after Mar 20 strike. Energy infrastructure attacks paused amid negotiations. Also found 'Qatari LNG ships head to US' article.

keyFindings.omanSalalahStruck: Salalah Port hit by 2 Iranian drones Mar 29. Crane damaged, 1 worker injured. Maersk ~48hr downtime. Critical: this is Oman's key alternative to Gulf routes.
keyFindings.adnocSafeenHit: ADNOC Safeen container ship hit by projectile in Strait of Hormuz. Reported by The Loadstar via Kpler.
keyFindings.houthiAttack: Houthis launched ballistic missiles at Israel Mar 28 — first attack since war began. Fears of Red Sea shipping disruption renewal.
keyFindings.irgcHormuzClosure: IRGC formally declared Hormuz closed to US/allied vessels Mar 27. Turned back 3 ships including 2 COSCO vessels.
keyFindings.pipelineBypass: Saudi East-West at 2.9M bpd, UAE ADCOP at 1.62M bpd. Combined ~9M vs 20M bpd Strait capacity.
keyFindings.australianLNG: Cyclone Narelle hit 29 Mtpa Australian LNG (Gorgon, Wheatstone, NWS) Mar 26 — compounds Qatar 77 Mtpa shutdown.
keyFindings.oilPrices: Brent $112.57 (+4.22%), WTI $99.64 (+5.46%) Mar 28. Analysts warn $200 possible.
keyFindings.samrefYanbu: S&P Global CERA confirms SAMREF Yanbu refinery (400k bpd) hit by drone — damage unclear, status updated to partial.
keyFindings.dasIslandLNG: ADNOC Gas adjusting LNG production at 6 Mtpa Das Island facility due to shipping disruptions — S&P Global CERA Mar 27.

noNewFMsReason: No new FM declarations found since Iraq Oil Ministry (fm-024, Mar 20). Most FMs declared in weeks 1-2 (Mar 1-11) when disruptions began. By week 4, situation is entrenched — existing FMs cover ongoing disruptions. QatarEnergy Mar 24 extension already captured.
gasNotesFixReason: All 9 countries now have commodity-specific gas notes (previously oil and gas notes were identical). Gas notes describe gas-specific impacts: associated gas, gas processing, pipeline status.
